title: Generic Round Ball Hair Brush, 3D 360 Degree Spherical Curl Styling Brush with Painless Soft for Scalp Massage and Growth for Girls with Long Fragile Wet Dry Wavy Coily Hair
features: SCALP MASSAGE: The massage hair brush comb has painless soft brish hair that massage the scalp and increase circulation, which may help increase Growth of hair.
ALLOW AIR TO CIRCULATE: This 3D spherical comb allows air to circulate as you dry your hair, making it for styling your hair with the heat of a blow dryer.
SCALP PROTECTION: The spherical styling brush is effective in removing hair knots, protecting your hair from damage, and removing dandruff and dirt.
SPHERICAL DESIGN: Unique round plastic brush hair separate your hair from the side instead of down, effectively reducing knots and keeping your hair soft and shiny.
MULTIFUNCTION BRUSH: Our curling brush works well on both wet and dry hair. for girls with long, fragile hair. 360° creates all kinds of looks for you.
description: Specification: Item Type: Round Ball Hair Brush Material: ABS Size: Diameter: Approx. 10.5cm / 4.1in Length: Approx. 21.5cm / 8.5in Heat : 140℃ Function: The comb tooth of the ball comb is spread out, the hollow design will not damage your hair, 360 degree spherical design packing list: 1 x Round Ball Hair Brush
